resourceGroups: Calls, Conferences, Queues, Applications, Numbers, Recordings, and Diagnostics

sdks.name: Python
sdks.description: Synchronous Client and AsyncClient. Pydantic v2 models, httpx transport, typed exception hierarchy.

sdks.name: TypeScript / Node
sdks.description: ESM and CJS entry points. Async-only API, fetch-based transport, zero runtime dependencies.

sdks.name: Go
sdks.description: Context-aware methods over net/http from the standard library. No third-party dependencies on the hot path.

sdks.name: Java
sdks.description: Java 11+ client over java.net.http. Builder-style request construction, Jackson serialization.

sdks.name: C# / .NET
sdks.description: Net 8 async/await client. System.Text.Json serialization; zero NuGet dependencies.

sdks.name: PHP
sdks.description: PHP 8.1+ client on Guzzle 7. Typed enums, PSR-4 autoloading, predictable exception types.

sdks.name: Ruby
sdks.description: Ruby 3 client over the standard-library Net::HTTP. Keyword-argument methods, zero gem dependencies.

sdks.name: Swift
sdks.description: Swift 5.9 client with async throws methods over URLSession. iOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, and Linux targets.
